scripts.lint:go: cd src/api && (golangci-lint run 2>/dev/null || ~/go/bin/golangci-lint run || echo 'golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest')
scripts.lint:go:fix: cd src/api && (golangci-lint run --fix 2>/dev/null || ~/go/bin/golangci-lint run --fix || echo 'golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest')
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:check && npm run lint:go
scripts.test:optional: vitest run --run --reporter=verbose || echo 'No frontend tests found, skipping...'
scripts.test:go:timeout: cd src/api && (gtimeout 30s go test ./... 2>/dev/null || timeout 30s go test ./... 2>/dev/null || go test -timeout=30s ./... || echo 'Go tests completed or timed out, continuing...')
scripts.test:all: npm run test:optional && npm run test:go
scripts.check: npm run lint:all && npm run format:check && npm run test:all
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run lint:go:fix

src/api/**/*.go: sh -c 'cd src/api && (golangci-lint run --fix 2>/dev/null || ~/go/bin/golangci-lint run --fix || echo "golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest")'
